name: Liu Bei

skills.name: Reinforced Shells
skills.description: When Basic Attacks hit a hero, it increases his Physical Pierce.

skills.name: Dual Shot
skills.description: Increases Movement Speed and enhances the next Basic Attack to damage twice.

skills.name: Leading the Charge
skills.description: Dashes forward, damaging and knocking back enemies in the way.

skills.name: Hearts and Minds
skills.description: Removes crowd control, increases Physical Attack, and gains crowd control immunity and a shield.

skillsZh.name: 強化霰彈
skillsZh.description: 劉備普攻若命中英雄，會強化自身物理穿透。

skillsZh.name: 雙重射擊
skillsZh.description: 劉備加速並強化下次普攻，造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 身先士卒
skillsZh.description: 劉備向前位移並擊退路上的敵人，造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 以德服人
skillsZh.description: 劉備解控並強化自身攻擊力，獲得霸體和護盾。

tips: Liu Bei (Warrior): Tier B — 54.7% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Doomsday, Master Sword, Blood Rage.
tipsZh: 劉備（打野）：梯度 B，勝率 54.7%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：末世、宗師之力、血魔之怒.

patchHistory.change: Increased BA range, reduced Skill 1 CD in early game
patchHistory.detail: Liu Bei's shotgun is most effective up close, and Skill 1 is his core damage and mobility skill, so we have reduced its cooldown in the early game to improve his leveling efficiency. The range of his shotgun has also been increased to give him some mid-range coverage.
Do no evil no matter how small, and do not avoid doing good no matter how small.

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升普攻射程，降低1技能前期冷卻
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「劉備在接近對手時可以發揮出霰彈槍的最大威力，其中1技能作為移動和輸出的核心主要技能，我們適當降低了前期的冷卻來提升他的發育效率；同時霰彈槍的射程升級也能讓他兼顧一定的中距離作戰能力。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升大招攻擊力和護盾量
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「勿以惡小而為之，勿以善小而不為。」

faqs.question: Is Liu Bei good in current season?
faqs.answer: Liu Bei is Tier B Warrior with 54.7% win rate, 0.44% pick rate, and 0.05% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Liu Bei build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Doomsday, Master Sword, Blood Rage, Ravage - Phantom, Sage's Sanctuary, Immovable - Sky Dome.

faqs.question: How to counter Liu Bei?
faqs.answer: Pick Dyadia. Strong into Lady Zhen, Nuwa, Xiao Qiao.

faqsZh.question: 劉備 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 劉備 為 B 梯度，勝率 54.7%、選取 0.44%、禁用 0.05%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 劉備 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：末世、宗師之力、血魔之怒、侵略・怒魂、賢者的庇護、不動・天穹.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 劉備？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Dyadia。劉備 克制 Lady Zhen、Nuwa、Xiao Qiao。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Lady Zhen, Nuwa, Xiao Qiao. Weak into: Dyadia.

guide.overview: Liu Bei is a Medium Warrior (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 54.5% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Liu Bei: When Basic Attacks hit a hero, it increases his Physical Pierce.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Rapacious Bite, Boots of Dexterity, Axe of Torment, then complete Doomsday, Cuirass of Savagery, Master Sword. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Red for stats that match Liu Bei's Warrior kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Dual Shot → Leading the Charge → Hearts and Minds → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Hearts and Minds (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Leading the Charge provides mobility or stick—max first. Dual Shot second for damage. Hearts and Minds on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Dual Shot → Leading the Charge → Hearts and Minds → weave basic attacks

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Hearts and Minds after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
guide.highRank: Liu Bei sits at Tier B globally (54.5% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Liu Bei vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Liu Bei has +1.9% WR vs Li Xin in Camp data. Choose Liu Bei when you need Jungling identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.
Liu Bei vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Liu Bei has +4.4% WR vs Chicha in Camp data. Choose Liu Bei when you need Jungling identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Liu Bei excels into Lady Zhen, Nuwa, Xiao Qiao. Avoid blind picking into Dyadia, Chano without team peel.
